meta.description: Runs daily: fetches Jira issues, calculates delivery metrics, analyzes with OpenAI, sends report to Telegram.

nodes.name: Fetch Jira Issues
nodes.notes: Basic auth: JIRA_EMAIL + JIRA_API_TOKEN. Returns paginated issues with changelog for cycle time calculation.

nodes.name: Calculate Metrics
nodes.notes: Calculates Cycle Time, Lead Time, Throughput, Predictability from Jira changelog data.

nodes.name: Analyze with OpenAI

parameters.body:
={
  "model": "o4-mini",
  "reasoning": { "effort": "medium" },
  "instructions": "You are an expert delivery analyst. Produce concise, specific, non-generic delivery guidance for engineering teams.",
  "input": "Analyze delivery metrics:
- Cycle Time: {{ $json.metrics.cycleTimeDays }}d
- Lead Time: {{ $json.metrics.leadTimeDays }}d
- Throughput: {{ $json.metrics.throughput }} issues
- Predictability: {{ $json.metrics.predictability }}%
- Backlog: {{ $json.metrics.backlogSize }}
- In Progress: {{ $json.metrics.inProgressCount }}
- Reopened: {{ $json.metrics.reopenedCount }}

Identify risks, explain causes, suggest actions. No generic advice. Be concise.

Return format:
Summary: 1-2 sentences
Risks:
- bullet
Actions:
- bullet"
}

nodes.notes: Calls OpenAI Responses API. Requires Bearer token in n8n credentials.

nodes.name: Format Report
nodes.notes: Combines metrics and AI analysis into a Telegram-ready message.

nodes.name: Send to Telegram
nodes.notes: Sends the final report to Telegram. Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID in n8n environment variables.
